name: Garden Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tablespoon vegetable oil or salad oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped vegetables in a pot and cover with water.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add seasonings (basil, garlic powder, salt, oregano).
4. Cover the pot and reduce heat to medium-low; continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Stir in vegetable oil or salad oil, cover, and cook on medium-low until carrots are tender, about 30 minutes.
6. Drain the spaghetti and toss with the prepared sauce.
